page.notFoundDescription: The link may be out of date. Search again to find a doctor, lab or radiology center near you.

wizard.signInBody: Appointments are kept on your account, against the patient they're for. Sign in or create an account to continue.

blocked.patient: Please choose who this booking is for.
blocked.service: Please choose a service to continue.
blocked.ineligible: This patient is not eligible for this service.
blocked.acknowledge: Please tick both acknowledgements to continue.
blocked.date: Please pick a date to continue.
blocked.time: Please pick a time to continue.

toast.missingDetails: Some booking details are missing. Please review the steps.
toast.paid: Payment received — your booking is confirmed.
toast.expired: Your reservation window expired and the place was released. Please pick a time again.
toast.released: Your place was released. Pick another time when you're ready.
toast.paymentFailed: The payment did not go through, so the place was released.

provider.bookings: {count, plural, =0 {No bookings} one {{n} booking} other {{n} bookings}}

date.title: Select a date
date.subtitle: Green dots mark days with places.
date.subtitleBranch: Open days at {branch}. Green dots mark days with places.

time.sessionSubtitle: Doctors run sessions, not exact minutes: you get a queue number and an estimated time.

slot.sessionBusy: You'd be #{number} — the session is busy
slot.sessionBusyWithTime: You'd be #{number}, seen around ~{time} — the session is busy

patient.title: Who is this booking for?
patient.subtitle: The visit, and the medical history that comes from it, belongs to this person — not to the account.
patient.empty: This account has no patient profiles yet. Add the person this booking is for below.
patient.addCtaHint: Book for a child, spouse or parent under your own account.
patient.addSubtitle: They stay private to your account and are never linked to anyone else's.
patient.saveFailed: We couldn't add that family member. Please try again.

validation.dateOfBirth: Please enter a date of birth.
validation.dateOfBirthFuture: Date of birth can't be in the future.
validation.phone: Enter a valid Egyptian mobile number, e.g. 01012345678.

service.branchSubtitle: Each branch keeps its own schedule, services and prices — pick where you'd like to be seen first.
service.branchEmpty: This provider has no active branch taking bookings right now.
service.subtitleBranch: Offered at {branch}. Prices are this branch's prices — no hidden fees at the counter.
service.subtitleNoBranch: Pick a branch first — services and prices differ between branches.
service.chooseBranchFirst: Choose a branch above to see what it offers.
service.branchNoServices: {branch} has no bookable services listed. Try another branch.
service.noMatches: No services match “{query}”. Try a different search.

meta.includes: {count, plural, one {{n} item included} other {{n} items included}}

prep.title: Preparation & eligibility
prep.subtitle: {service} carries requirements a normal visit does not. Please read them before you book — they exist so the visit is not wasted.
prep.fastingRequired: Fast for {hours} hours before the appointment.
prep.fastingNotRequired: No fasting is needed for this service.
prep.waterAllowed: Plain water is allowed — and encouraged — during the fast.
prep.waterNotAllowed: Do not drink anything, including water, during the fast.

violation.genderMale: {service} is only available to male patients.
violation.genderFemale: {service} is only available to female patients.
violation.minAge: {service} is for patients aged {min} and over. {name} is {age}.
violation.maxAge: {service} is for patients aged {max} and under. {name} is {age}.

ack.title: Your acknowledgement
ack.subtitle: Both boxes are required before this booking can be taken.
ack.preparation: I have read the preparation instructions and will follow them.
ack.eligibility: I confirm that {name} meets the eligibility requirements for {service}.

blocked.title: {name} cannot have {service}
blocked.body: This booking cannot go ahead. Choose a different patient, or a different service.

capacity.busyQueue: You'd be #{number}. You can still book — it just means a longer wait.
capacity.busyQueueWithTime: You'd be #{number}, seen around ~{time}. You can still book — it just means a longer wait.
capacity.busyGeneric: This place is over the comfort limit. You can still book — it just means a longer wait.
capacity.busyNextSession: The next session is {when} if you'd rather not wait.
capacity.busyNextSlot: The next open time is {when} if you'd rather not wait.
capacity.fullBody: The last place has just been taken, and this limit is never exceeded.
capacity.consent: Booking anyway means you accept the longer wait.

eligibilityBlocked.title: This booking can't go ahead
eligibilityBlocked.description: The selected patient does not meet this service's requirements.

reason.gender: This service is not available to this patient's gender.
reason.min_age: This patient is below the minimum age for this service.
reason.max_age: This patient is above the maximum age for this service.
reason.pregnancy: This service is not performed during pregnancy.
reason.condition: One of this patient's chronic conditions makes this service unsuitable.

payment.methodSubtitle: The {fee} booking fee is what confirms your place. The visit itself is paid in cash at the clinic.

methodHint.cash: No online fee. Your booking is confirmed straight away.
methodHint.card: Visa, Mastercard or Meeza — the booking fee is charged now.
methodHint.vodafone_cash: Confirm the booking fee on your Vodafone wallet.
methodHint.instapay: Pay the booking fee by instant bank transfer.

payment.holdBody: Pay the {fee} booking fee within the window and the place is yours. Let it lapse and the place goes back.
payment.paySubtitle: {method} · {fee}. The {total} visit fee is paid in cash at the clinic.

coupon.title: Coupon code
coupon.subtitle: Applies to the visit fee you settle at the clinic.
coupon.failed: We couldn't check that coupon. Please try again.

notes.title: Symptoms or notes (optional)
notes.subtitle: Shared only with the provider you're booking.
notes.placeholder: Briefly describe the reason for the visit…

summary.title: Order summary
summary.onlineHint: The booking fee that confirms your place.
summary.onlineNone: Nothing to pay online — cash bookings carry no fee.
summary.atClinicHint: The visit fee itself, settled in cash on the day.
summary.cashbackNote: Any active cashback campaign is credited to your wallet automatically once the booking is confirmed.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmed
confirmation.sessionBody: {name} is number {number} in the queue. It's an estimate, not an exact minute.
confirmation.sessionBodyWithTime: {name} is number {number} in the queue, expected to be seen around ~{time}. It's an estimate, not an exact minute.
confirmation.copyFailed: Couldn't copy — please write the reference down.
confirmation.overCapacity: Over the comfort limit — longer wait
confirmation.ackBody: You confirmed you have read the preparation instructions and that {name} meets the eligibility requirements.
confirmation.cashback: You earned cashback on this booking.
